models.label: SpotUNet anyscale8 peaked+sharpened (scale-robust, bundled)
models.notes: spotunet_anyscale8_peaked_sharpened from yoloDiffraction: the anyscale8_peaked scale-robust base (base8, levels=3; trained across disk sizes, so it tolerates residual scale error after the canonical rescale) with the sharpened offset head grafted on. Best current all-rounder on real 4D-STEM (ZrNb/CuNb/SPED-Ag truth benchmark, 2026-07-16); parameter-free with auto-calibration.

models.label: SpotUNet production (bundled)
models.notes: SRO-augmented edge-decoupled detector; best on CuNb/ZrNb/SPED-Ag, parameter-free with auto-calibration. Beats WNCC on crystalline 4D-STEM. Slightly higher crystal recall than anyscale8 on canonical-size disks; weaker off its trained scale.

models.label: SpotUNet base16 (legacy)
models.notes: Earlier edge-trained detector. Kept as a fallback.
